title: festuca idahoensis var. oregona
intro: Festuca idahoensis var. oregona, also known as Idaho fescue or Oregon fescue, is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Festuca idahoensis var. oregona include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, with the dried leaves and flowers often being used in traditional medicine.
